title: What is the Pool?
bodyText:
Everything drowns here: Roman + Yena ([[pc-felson|Felson]]'s parents), Leliana, [[lathander]], arguably [[shipton]] itself, and whoever [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] used to be. The chained underwater god of Eddy's visions. [[session-10|The cube]]'s essence-drain felt like "something deeper than magic" being taken. See [[the-pool]] for the full DM truth.

**At the table so far:** [[giuseppe|G]]'s lake story (S08), Eddy's dreams, the cube's drain, "the pools are growing."

# Resolved for the DM (grill 2026-07-09)
[[the-pool]] is a **primordial consuming weapon**, seeded on [[elor-the-world|Elor]] ages ago by a cosmic being that wishes only to consume. That maker will one day **return to harvest** everything the Pool has collected — the looming dread of **Chapter 2+**. **It cannot be killed, only slowed/contained.** Several parties weaponize it now: **[[lolth]]** (caged [[eilistraee]]), the **old wizard** [[pool-wizard]] (Ch-1 antagonist, tapping it for power/long life), and possibly others. Chapter-1 payoff = **free [[eilistraee]] from the cult pool** ([[arc-chapter-1]]); **Lathander is in a different pool** — finding him is Chapter 2 ([[lathander]]).
